enrichment.short_description: Cloud-based design platform for creating infographics, reports, presentations, and visual content with AI-assisted generation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Piktochart is a web-based infographic and design maker with templates, AI generation, and brand kits for teams and individuals.

features.title: AI Infographic Generator
features.description: Creates infographic designs from a text prompt using AI credits.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Over 230 professionally designed templates across categories like timelines, comparisons, and reports.

features.title: Data visualization
features.description: Build pie charts, bar charts, and pictographs, with CSV, Excel, and Google Sheets import.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.description: Upload logos, extract brand colors, and apply custom fonts for consistent branded content.

features.title: Drag-and-drop editor
features.description: Customize colors, fonts, and layouts without design experience.

features.title: Interactive infographics
features.description: Add interactive elements to infographics for audience engagement.

pros: Free plan available with no watermark on PNG downloads
AI credits included even on the free tier
Dedicated Education and Nonprofit pricing tiers
Large template library across many content formats
cons: Free plan limited to 2 PNG downloads
PDF and PowerPoint export require a paid Business plan
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only
Web-based only, no listed desktop or mobile apps

faqs.question: Is Piktochart free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Piktochart has a free plan that includes unlimited visual projects, 60 AI credits, and 2 PNG downloads.

faqs.question: Does Piktochart use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes an AI Infographic Generator and other AI design generators that use monthly AI credits.

faqs.question: Can I export to PDF or PowerPoint?
faqs.answer: PDF and PPT export are available on the Business plan and above.

faqs.question: Does Piktochart offer team pricing?
faqs.answer: Yes, Pro and Business plans support 1-100 team members, and Enterprise supports 101+.

use_cases.title: Marketing reports
use_cases.description: Build data-driven reports and infographics from spreadsheet data.

use_cases.title: Educational visuals
use_cases.description: Create infographics and presentations at discounted Education pricing.

use_cases.title: Brand-consistent content
use_cases.description: Use Brand Kit to keep logos, colors, and fonts consistent across designs.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Piktochart?
paragraphs: Piktochart is a cloud-based design platform for creating infographics, reports, presentations, and other visual content without design experience.
It combines a drag-and-drop editor with an AI Infographic Generator, template library, and data visualization tools that import from CSV, Excel, or Google Sheets.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Piktochart is for
paragraphs: Piktochart suits marketing teams, educators, nonprofits, and small businesses that need to turn data or text into visual reports and infographics, with dedicated discounted pricing for education and nonprofit organizations.

enrichment.short_description: Web-based design platform for creating infographics, reports, and presentations with AI-assisted generation and brand kits.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Venngage is a design platform for infographics, reports, and presentations with AI generation, templates, and brand kits.

features.title: DesignAI Generator
features.description: Generates visual designs from plain text descriptions.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Over 10,000 customizable templates for infographics, reports, and presentations.

features.title: Royalty-free assets
features.description: Access to 4M+ icons, illustrations, stock photos, and maps.

features.title: AI accessibility checker
features.description: Checks designs for WCAG compliance.

features.title: Brand Kit
features.description: Manage brand colors, fonts, and logos for team consistency.

features.title: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Multiple users can edit designs together.

features.title: Multi-format export
features.description: Export designs as PNG, PDF, PPTX, or HTML.

pros: Large template library with over 10,000 options
AI design generation and AI accessibility checker included
Supports multiple UI languages
Free plan available to start
cons: Free plan limited to 5 designs and public sharing only
PDF and PowerPoint export require the Business plan
Enterprise pricing requires a minimum of 10 members
Web-based only, no listed desktop or mobile apps

faqs.question: Is Venngage free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Venngage has a free plan limited to 5 designs with public sharing and a free AI trial.

faqs.question: Does Venngage support multiple languages?
faqs.answer: Yes, the interface supports English, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, German, and Arabic.

faqs.question: Can I export to PDF or PowerPoint?
faqs.answer: PDF and PowerPoint export are available starting on the Business plan.

faqs.question: Does Venngage have an Enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Enterprise pricing starts at $499/month with a minimum of 10 members.

use_cases.title: Marketing infographics
use_cases.description: Turn text and data into shareable infographics using DesignAI.

use_cases.title: HR and internal reports
use_cases.description: Create branded reports and presentations for internal teams.

use_cases.title: Nonprofit communications
use_cases.description: Design visual content for outreach and reporting.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Venngage?
paragraphs: Venngage is a web-based design platform for creating infographics, reports, presentations, and other visual content.
It pairs a drag-and-drop editor with an AI generator called DesignAI, a library of over 10,000 templates, and 4M+ royalty-free assets.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Venngage is for
paragraphs: Venngage is aimed at marketing professionals, HR teams, nonprofits, and enterprise organizations that need branded visual content, with multi-language support for international teams.

enrichment.short_description: Web-based graphic design tool for creating social media graphics, ads, and blog images from templates.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Snappa is a web-based graphic design tool with templates, stock photos, and one-click background removal for social media graphics.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Thousands of pre-made templates sized for social media, ads, and blogs.

features.title: Stock photo library
features.description: Access to over 5,000,000 free, high-resolution stock photos.

features.title: Background removal
features.description: One-click background removal for photos.

features.title: Image dimension presets
features.description: Presets for common social media and ad platform sizes.

features.title: Fonts and vectors
features.description: 200+ fonts and 100,000+ vectors and shapes.

features.title: Buffer integration
features.description: Schedule and share designs to social media via Buffer.

pros: Free Starter plan with no cost to begin
Large stock photo and template library included in all plans
One-click background removal built in
Buffer integration for direct social scheduling
cons: Free plan limited to 3 downloads per month
Team plan limited to 5 users
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site

faqs.question: Is Snappa free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Snappa has a free Starter plan limited to 3 downloads per month.

faqs.question: Does Snappa include stock photos?
faqs.answer: Yes, all plans include access to over 5,000,000 free, high-resolution stock photos and graphics.

faqs.question: Can I schedule posts from Snappa?
faqs.answer: Yes, Snappa integrates with Buffer for social media sharing and scheduling.

faqs.question: How much does Snappa cost?
faqs.answer: Pro is $15/month (or $10/month billed yearly) and Team is $30/month (or $20/month billed yearly) for 5 users.

use_cases.title: Social media graphics
use_cases.description: Create graphics sized for specific social platforms using templates.

use_cases.title: Blog and ad visuals
use_cases.description: Design blog headers and advertisements without a designer.

use_cases.title: Team content production
use_cases.description: Collaborate on graphics with up to 5 users on the Team plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Snappa?
paragraphs: Snappa is a web-based graphic design tool for creating graphics for social media, advertisements, and blogs without design expertise.
It provides thousands of templates, a library of over 5,000,000 stock photos, and one-click background removal, with unlimited downloads on paid plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Snappa is for
paragraphs: Snappa is built for non-designers and content creators who need to produce social media and marketing graphics quickly, including small teams of up to 5 users on the Team plan.

enrichment.short_description: Design automation platform that converts brand guidelines into resized, on-brand marketing graphics across channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: RelayThat automates on-brand marketing graphics with SmartLayouts, brand portals, and one-click resizing for ads and social media.

features.title: SmartLayouts
features.description: Over 2,000 layout templates that auto-adjust to brand guidelines.

features.title: Brand portals
features.description: Manage brand colors, fonts, and assets in one place.

features.title: Headline Generator
features.description: Generates headline copy using wildcard keywords.

features.title: One-click resizing
features.description: Resize a design across multiple ad sizes and social channels at once.

features.title: Royalty-free image library
features.description: Access to over 3 million copyright-free images.

features.title: Custom font uploads
features.description: Upload brand-specific fonts for use across designs.

pros: Automated resizing across many ad and social formats at once
Large royalty-free image library included
Headline Generator speeds up ad copywriting
Enterprise tier offers white-label and branded sign-in options
cons: No free plan; paid subscription required from the start
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site

faqs.question: Does RelayThat have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, RelayThat does not offer a free plan; pricing starts at $15/month for the Pro tier.

faqs.question: What is a SmartLayout?
faqs.answer: SmartLayouts are pre-built design templates, with over 2,000 available, that adapt to a brand's colors, fonts, and assets.

faqs.question: Can RelayThat generate ad copy?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Headline Generator uses wildcard keywords to produce headline copy automatically.

faqs.question: Does RelayThat support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Pro+ Plus plan includes 2 users, and Enterprise supports larger teams with branded sign-in pages.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel ad creation
use_cases.description: Resize a single design across dozens of ad and social formats at once.

use_cases.title: Agency campaign production
use_cases.description: Manage multiple client brand portals and campaigns.

use_cases.title: Real estate marketing
use_cases.description: Produce branded listing graphics and ads.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is RelayThat?
paragraphs: RelayThat is a design automation platform that converts brand guidelines into on-brand marketing images across multiple channels.
It uses SmartLayouts to automatically apply a brand's colors, fonts, and assets, and includes a Headline Generator and one-click resizing for ads and social media.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who RelayThat is for
paragraphs: RelayThat is aimed at marketing managers, agencies, and real estate professionals who need to produce consistent, on-brand ad creative across many formats quickly.

enrichment.short_description: Brand enablement platform (formerly Lucidpress) for building locked templates that teams personalize while staying on-brand.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Marq is a brand templating platform with locked brand controls, smart fields, and data automation for on-brand content at scale.

features.title: Brand controls
features.description: Lock logos, fonts, and colors on templates so team members can't go off-brand.

features.title: Smart Fields
features.description: Auto-populate text and images from custom data sources.

features.title: Data automation
features.description: Integrate data via CSV, Google Sheets, XML, or MLS feeds.

features.title: Approval workflows
features.description: Review and approve designs in real time before publishing.

features.title: Marq AI
features.description: AI-powered brand guardrails and automated creative workflows.

features.title: Print integration
features.description: Order print products directly from the platform.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Track template usage and performance.

pros: Free plan available to start
Strong brand-locking controls for non-designers on a team
Data automation supports CSV, Google Sheets, XML, and MLS
Print ordering built into the platform
cons: Free plan limited to 25MB storage and 3 projects
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site

faqs.question: Is Marq free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Marq has a free plan with 25MB storage and a 3-project limit.

faqs.question: Was Marq previously called something else?
faqs.answer: Yes, Marq was previously known as Lucidpress before rebranding.

faqs.question: Does Marq support data automation?
faqs.answer: Yes, it can populate templates from CSV, Google Sheets, XML, or MLS data feeds.

faqs.question: Does Marq have AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, Marq AI provides brand guardrails and automated creative workflows.

use_cases.title: Franchise marketing
use_cases.description: Let local franchise teams personalize approved templates without breaking brand rules.

use_cases.title: Real estate listing flyers
use_cases.description: Auto-populate listing templates from MLS data.

use_cases.title: Healthcare and education collateral
use_cases.description: Produce on-brand materials across departments with approval workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Marq?
paragraphs: Marq, formerly known as Lucidpress, is a brand enablement platform for creating locked templates that teams can personalize while staying on-brand.
It offers Smart Fields for auto-populating content, data automation from sources like CSV and MLS feeds, approval workflows, and Marq AI for brand guardrails.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Marq is for
paragraphs: Marq is aimed at mid to large organizations in real estate, healthcare, education, franchises, and financial services that need consistent branded content produced by non-designers across teams.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered design platform for creating branding, merchandise, and product visuals with generative image, vector, and video tools.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Kittl is an AI design platform with generative image, vector, and video tools plus templates for branding and merchandise design.

features.title: AI image generation
features.description: Generate images from text prompts within the editor.

features.title: AI vector generation
features.description: Create vector graphics using AI models.

features.title: AI video generation
features.description: Generate short videos from prompts.

features.title: Background removal and upscaling
features.description: Remove backgrounds and upscale images automatically.

features.title: Vectorization
features.description: Convert raster images into vector graphics.

features.title: Templates and mockups
features.description: Customizable templates and product mockups for branding.

features.title: Asset library
features.description: Access to over 1M photos, graphics, and fonts.

pros: Free plan includes 200 one-time AI tokens to try AI tools
Integrates multiple third-party AI models (ByteDance, Ideogram, Google, OpenAI, Black Forest Labs)
Real-time collaboration in an infinite-canvas editor
Broad AI toolset covering image, vector, and video generation
cons: Free plan limited to 5 projects and one-time AI tokens rather than recurring credits
Daily AI credit caps on Pro (30/day) and Expert (80/day) plans
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site

faqs.question: Is Kittl free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 5 projects, 200 one-time AI tokens, and basic templates.

faqs.question: How much does Kittl Pro cost?
faqs.answer: Pro is $19/month, or $14/month billed annually, with 30 daily AI credits.

faqs.question: What AI models does Kittl use?
faqs.answer: Kittl integrates AI models from ByteDance, Ideogram, Google, OpenAI, and Black Forest Labs.

faqs.question: Can Kittl generate video?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Creative Suite includes video generation alongside image and vector generation.

use_cases.title: Merchandise design
use_cases.description: Generate and vectorize graphics for print-on-demand products.

use_cases.title: Brand visual creation
use_cases.description: Produce branding assets using AI image and vector tools.

use_cases.title: Social media content
use_cases.description: Create social graphics and videos from templates and AI generation.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Kittl?
paragraphs: Kittl is an AI-powered design platform for creating branding and product visuals, combining a professional editor with generative image, vector, and video tools.
It integrates multiple third-party AI models and provides templates, mockups, and a library of over 1M photos, graphics, and fonts.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Kittl is for
paragraphs: Kittl is built for designers, small businesses, and merchandise creators who want to combine AI generation with template-based design for branding and social content.

enrichment.short_description: Browser-based mockup generator that applies images or videos to realistic device, apparel, and packaging mockups.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Artboard Studio is a browser-based mockup generator with 5,000+ mockups, video mockups, and an AI text-to-mockup tool.

features.title: Mockup library
features.description: Over 5,000 mockups across devices, apparel, packaging, print, and branding.

features.title: AI mockup generator
features.description: Turns a text prompt into a ready-to-use mockup.

features.title: Video mockups
features.description: Apply videos to mockup surfaces and export as video files.

features.title: Browser-based editor
features.description: No software installation required to edit mockups.

features.title: Figma and Adobe Express plugins
features.description: Integrate mockup creation into existing design workflows.

features.title: Multi-format export
features.description: Export images as PNG, JPEG, or WEBP, and video as MP4 or WEBM.

pros: Free tier available to get started
Large mockup library covering devices, apparel, and packaging
Video mockup support, not just static images
Direct Figma and Adobe Express plugin integration
cons: Unlimited exports require the paid Pro plan
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site

faqs.question: Is Artboard Studio free?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers a freemium plan; paid tiers start at $9/month billed annually.

faqs.question: Does Artboard Studio support video mockups?
faqs.answer: Yes, users can apply videos to mockup surfaces and export as MP4 or WEBM.

faqs.question: Is there a Figma plugin?
faqs.answer: Yes, Artboard Studio has both a Figma plugin and an Adobe Express plugin.

faqs.question: Is there a lifetime plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a Lifetime Mockup plan is available for a $129 one-time payment.

use_cases.title: Portfolio presentation
use_cases.description: Showcase design work on realistic device and print mockups.

use_cases.title: Product marketing visuals
use_cases.description: Generate mockups for apparel, packaging, and branding.

use_cases.title: Client case studies
use_cases.description: Present client projects with polished mockup visuals.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Artboard Studio?
paragraphs: Artboard Studio is a browser-based mockup generator that lets designers apply images or videos to thousands of realistic mockups across devices, apparel, packaging, and print.
It includes an AI mockup generator that turns a text prompt into a ready-to-use mockup, plus Figma and Adobe Express plugins.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Artboard Studio is for
paragraphs: It's built for designers and freelancers who need quick, realistic mockups for portfolios, case studies, and client presentations without installing software.

enrichment.short_description: 3D mockup and animation tool for displaying app and web designs on realistic device models with camera and lighting controls.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Rotato creates 3D device mockups and animated videos of app and web designs, with a free unlimited trial and no credit card required.

features.title: 3D device library
features.description: 30+ pre-built 3D models of phones, laptops, and watches.

features.title: 3D animation timeline
features.description: Animate device mockups with timeline-based control.

features.title: Virtual camera controls
features.description: DSLR-level virtual camera lens controls for framing shots.

features.title: Figma plugin
features.description: Import designs directly from Figma.

features.title: iPhone mirroring
features.description: Mirror an iPhone screen via USB into a mockup scene.

features.title: 8K export
features.description: Export mockups and animations at up to 8K resolution.

features.title: Customization
features.description: Adjust reflections, backgrounds, device colors, orientations, and shadow styles.

pros: Unlimited free trial with no credit card required
Lifetime one-time payment plans instead of a subscription
8K export resolution and ProRes support on higher tiers
Figma plugin for direct design import
cons: Mac only currently; Windows version is still in development
Exact plan prices are not published on the pricing page (Premium/Standard/Basic tiers link to checkout for pricing)
No AI features mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Is Rotato free?
faqs.answer: Rotato offers an unlimited free trial with no credit card required and no usage limits; paid Pro plans unlock additional templates and devices.

faqs.question: Does Rotato run on Windows?
faqs.answer: Rotato is primarily a Mac app; a Windows version is mentioned as in development.

faqs.question: Is Rotato a subscription?
faqs.answer: No, paid plans are one-time payments that provide lifetime access to included devices and features.

faqs.question: Can I import Figma designs?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rotato has a Figma plugin for importing designs directly.

use_cases.title: App Store screenshots
use_cases.description: Create polished device mockups for App Store listings.

use_cases.title: Product launch videos
use_cases.description: Animate app or web designs on 3D devices for launch marketing.

use_cases.title: Client presentations
use_cases.description: Present designs on realistic 3D device mockups.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rotato?
paragraphs: Rotato is a 3D mockup generator and animator for displaying app and web designs on realistic device screens, with over 30 pre-built 3D device models.
It offers DSLR-level virtual camera controls, timeline-based 3D animation, and export up to 8K resolution, available as a Mac app and web app.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rotato is for
paragraphs: Rotato is aimed at designers, indie developers, and marketing professionals creating App Store visuals, product launch videos, and client presentations without 3D experience.

enrichment.short_description: Web design tool for creating device mockups, animated presets, and short videos from static designs.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Shots turns static designs into device mockups, animations, and videos with magic backgrounds and social media export presets.

features.title: Mockup library
features.description: Free, ready-to-use device mockup templates including iPhone, Android, iPad, and desktop.

features.title: Animated mockups
features.description: Video zoom effects and animated presets applied to static designs.

features.title: Magic Backgrounds
features.description: Generates background variations based on uploaded content.

features.title: 3D shapes and shadows
features.description: Add 3D shapes and shadow overlays to designs.

features.title: Filters and effects
features.description: Apply noise, VHS, and glitch effects.

features.title: Export presets
features.description: Export with social media frame presets and shareable links.

features.title: Custom watermarking
features.description: Add a custom watermark for branding.

pros: Free mockup library with no cost to start
Built-in animation and video zoom effects, not just static mockups
Magic Backgrounds generates varied backgrounds automatically
Shareable links for exporting content
cons: Exact pricing for premium features is not published on the site
No languages, mobile app, or desktop app listed on the site
No founding year or headquarters information available

faqs.question: Is Shots free?
faqs.answer: Yes, Shots offers a free mockup library, with premium features available on paid plans.

faqs.question: What is Magic Backgrounds?
faqs.answer: It's a feature that generates background variations based on the content you've uploaded.

faqs.question: Can Shots create animated content?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports animated mockups, video zoom effects, and animation presets.

faqs.question: What devices are covered by the mockup library?
faqs.answer: The library includes iPhone, Android, iPad, and desktop device mockups.

use_cases.title: App Store previews
use_cases.description: Create device mockups and animated previews for app listings.

use_cases.title: Social media content
use_cases.description: Produce animated design showcases for social platforms.

use_cases.title: Product showcase videos
use_cases.description: Turn static UI designs into short showcase videos.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Shots?
paragraphs: Shots is a web-based design tool for turning static designs into device mockups, animations, and short videos.
It includes a free mockup library, Magic Backgrounds for automatic background generation, and animation presets with video zoom effects.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Shots is for
paragraphs: Shots is aimed at designers, content creators, and product teams who want to quickly turn static app or web designs into animated mockups for social media and app store listings.

enrichment.short_description: macOS screen recorder that automatically applies cursor-following zoom effects and smooths cursor movement for polished demo videos.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Screen Studio is a macOS screen recorder with automatic zoom, smooth cursor movement, and built-in editing for demo videos.

features.title: Automatic zoom
features.description: Automatically zooms in to follow cursor actions during recording.

features.title: Smooth cursor movement
features.description: Smooths cursor motion and lets you customize cursor size.

features.title: Multi-source recording
features.description: Records webcam, microphone, and system audio together.

features.title: iPhone/iPad recording
features.description: Records iOS devices directly via USB connection.

features.title: Automatic transcripts
features.description: Generates transcripts and subtitles automatically.

features.title: Vertical export mode
features.description: Export videos in vertical format for social media.

features.title: Keyboard shortcut display
features.description: Shows keyboard shortcuts used during recording.

pros: Fully automatic zoom and cursor smoothing with minimal manual editing
Records iPhone/iPad screens directly via USB
Transcript and background noise removal are processed locally
Used by teams at companies including Stripe, Vercel, and Google
cons: macOS only; Windows version is explicitly listed as not ready
No free plan; paid subscription required
No languages listed on the site

faqs.question: Does Screen Studio work on Windows?
faqs.answer: No, Screen Studio is macOS only; the FAQ states a Windows version is 'not ready.'

faqs.question: How much does Screen Studio cost?
faqs.answer: It's $20/month billed monthly, or $9/month billed yearly.

faqs.question: Can Screen Studio record iPhone screens?
faqs.answer: Yes, it can record iPhone or iPad screens via a USB connection.

faqs.question: Does Screen Studio generate transcripts?
faqs.answer: Yes, it automatically generates transcripts and subtitles, processed locally without sending data to servers.

use_cases.title: Product demo videos
use_cases.description: Record polished product walkthroughs with automatic zoom effects.

use_cases.title: Course and tutorial creation
use_cases.description: Produce instructional videos with clear cursor tracking and subtitles.

use_cases.title: Social content clips
use_cases.description: Export vertical-format recordings for social media.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Screen Studio?
paragraphs: Screen Studio is a macOS screen recorder built to produce polished product demo and tutorial videos with minimal manual editing.
It automatically applies cursor-following zoom effects, smooths cursor movement, records iPhone/iPad screens via USB, and generates transcripts locally on-device.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Screen Studio is for
paragraphs: It's built for Mac users creating product demos, tutorials, and social video content, including teams at companies such as Stripe, Vercel, and Google.
